name: Cloudflare Pay Per Crawl
description: Access web content via Cloudflare's pay-per-crawl system. Websites opt in to charge AI crawlers micropayments instead of blocking them. Returns full page content including behind soft paywalls.

name: x402Engine Crypto Price Feed
description: Real-time and historical cryptocurrency price data. Supports BTC, ETH, SOL, and 200+ tokens. Pay per query with no subscription required. Powered by x402engine.com.

name: to402.com API Proxy
description: Wrap any existing REST API with x402 micropayment gating. to402.com acts as a proxy layer — point it at your API and it handles all payment verification. Good for monetising existing services without code changes.

name: x402agent.shop — n8n Workflow Marketplace
description: Execute n8n automation workflows on demand. Browse and trigger community-built agents for tasks like lead enrichment, email drafting, Slack notifications, and data transformation. Pay per workflow run.

name: AgentSearch — Perplexity-style Research API
description: AI-powered web research with cited sources. Submit a research question and receive a synthesised answer with source URLs. Community-built on top of open search indices. Not affiliated with Perplexity AI.

name: Regulatory Filings Feed
description: Real-time feed of SEC filings (8-K, 10-K, 10-Q), FDA drug approvals, EU competition decisions, and CFTC enforcement actions. Structured JSON output. Community-operated, best-effort SLA.

name: Ouroboros Research API
description: Deep research agent powered by Ouroboros — the self-improving AI system. Accepts complex research tasks and returns structured reports with citations. Automatically selects the best model per task.

name: Ouroboros Multi-Model Consensus
description: Submit any question and receive a consensus answer synthesised across Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini. Returns individual model responses, a synthesised answer, and a confidence score. Built on Ouroboros.

name: Coinbase x402 Reference Server
description: Coinbase's official x402 protocol reference implementation. Demonstrates the complete x402 payment flow for HTTP 402 micropayments. Used as the canonical example for building x402-compatible services.

name: Bitte Protocol — NEAR AI Agent Marketplace
description: Marketplace for AI agents built on NEAR Protocol. Discover and invoke specialized agents for web search, data analysis, code execution, and cross-chain operations. Pay per agent invocation.

name: OpenMeter — Usage-Based Billing API
description: Real-time usage metering and billing API. Track API calls, compute time, tokens, and custom events. Built for SaaS and AI companies needing flexible usage-based pricing. OpenMeter is open-source.

name: Tavily AI Search API
description: AI-optimized search engine returning structured, LLM-ready results. Ideal for RAG pipelines, research agents, and fact-checking. Returns summaries, source URLs, and relevance scores.

name: Firecrawl — Web Scraping & Extraction API
description: Convert any website to clean, LLM-ready markdown. Handles JavaScript rendering, anti-bot measures, and dynamic content. Returns structured data, screenshots, and full-page markdown.

name: E2B — Secure Code Execution Sandbox
description: Run arbitrary code in isolated cloud sandboxes. Supports Python, JavaScript, Bash, and more. Sub-100ms cold start. Ideal for AI coding agents that need safe code execution without managing infrastructure.

name: Jina AI Reader — URL to LLM-Ready Content
description: Fetch any URL and receive clean, LLM-optimized content. Strips ads, nav, and boilerplate. Returns markdown with images described. Works on PDFs, articles, documentation, and paywalled content.

name: Browserless — Headless Chrome API
description: Managed headless Chrome infrastructure for web automation. Run Puppeteer and Playwright scripts without managing browsers. Supports screenshot, PDF, scraping, and form automation at scale.
